prompt: Create a computer graphics render inspired by the reference's intense sports action layout. Focus on VFX particle simulations depicting energy flows, motion trails, and impact dust clouds during dynamic play.
prompt_refined: Generate a high-fidelity computer graphics render of an intense sports action scene, drawing inspiration from the dynamic composition and athlete poses in image 1. Recreate the core layout, with a primary airborne player mid-shot on the right side of the frame, facing the goal on the left. Integrate advanced VFX particle simulations to depict vibrant energy flows around the players and ball, prominent motion trails indicating rapid movement, and subtle impact dust clouds generated by player exertion and interaction, especially concentrated around the central action.
objects: primary airborne player on the right side of the frame, facing the goal on the left
goal on the left side of the frame
vibrant energy flows around players and ball
subtle impact dust clouds concentrated around the central action
